caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional martial arts outfit performs a demonstration in a large indoor hall with light-colored walls and recessed ceiling lighting. He wields a long, slender staff, executing a series of dynamic movements. He begins by swinging the staff across his body while stepping forward, then lifts the staff high above his head. Transitioning into a lower stance, he sweeps the staff downward and then extends it horizontally across his front in a wide, grounded pose. In the background, an audience of people in various casual and formal attire sits behind red-clothed tables, watching the performance. The setting remains consistent throughout the sequence, with the focus shifting entirely to the man's fluid transitions and the motion of the staff. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
